requirement_topic.en: TRC Mandatory Radio Type Approval (Telecommunications Law No. 13 of 1995)
requirement_topic.zh: TRC强制无线电型号认证（1995年电信法第13号）
requirement_topic.zht: TRC強制無線電型號認證（1995年電信法第13號）

summary.en: All radio and telecom terminal equipment (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, LoRa, IoT, and any device using radio spectrum) must obtain TRC mandatory type approval under Jordan Telecommunications Law No. 13 of 1995 (as amended) before import or sale in Jordan. The TRC conformity mark and TRC approval number must appear visibly on the device and its packaging label. Approval requires test reports from an accredited laboratory to ETSI or equivalent standards accepted by TRC; the Jordan National Frequency Plan governs spectrum use and confirms 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz Wi-Fi operation is permitted under TRC licence conditions. CE Declaration of Conformity, FCC ID, and SRRC certificates are not accepted as substitutes by TRC. There is no regional mutual recognition arrangement equivalent to the GCC MRA that extends recognition to China, EU, or US approvals for Jordan.
summary.zh: 所有无线电及电信终端设备（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝、LoRa、物联网及任何使用无线频谱的设备）须依据《约旦电信法第13号（1995年，及其修正案）》取得TRC强制型号认证，方可进口或在约旦销售。TRC合规标志和TRC审批号须清晰显示于设备及其包装标签上。认证需提交经TRC认可的经认可实验室依据ETSI或等效标准出具的测试报告；约旦国家频率计划管理频谱使用，并确认2.4 GHz和5 GHz Wi-Fi在TRC许可条件下允许运行。TRC不接受CE符合性声明、FCC ID和SRRC证书作为替代。约旦不存在类似海湾合作委员会相互承认协议（GCC MRA）且延伸至中国、欧盟或美国批准的区域性相互承认安排。
summary.zht: 所有無線電及電信終端設備（Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩、LoRa、物聯網及任何使用無線頻譜的設備）須依據《約旦電信法第13號（1995年，及其修正案）》取得TRC強制型號認證，方可進口或在約旦銷售。TRC合規標誌和TRC審批號須清晰顯示於設備及其包裝標籤上。認證需提交經TRC認可的經認可實驗室依據ETSI或等效標準出具的測試報告；約旦國家頻率計劃管理頻譜使用，並確認2.4 GHz和5 GHz Wi-Fi在TRC許可條件下允許運行。TRC不接受CE符合性聲明、FCC ID和SRRC證書作為替代。約旦不存在類似海灣合作委員會相互承認協議（GCC MRA）且延伸至中國、歐盟或美國批准的區域性相互承認安排。

standards_or_laws: Jordan Telecommunications Law No. 13 of 1995 (as amended)
TRC Type Approval Procedures and Requirements (Jordan)

summary.en: In China, radio type approval is administered by MIIT/SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China). Telecom terminal equipment (devices connecting to public telecom networks) additionally requires a MIIT Network Access License (NAL). CCC (China Compulsory Certification) covers electrical safety and EMC for in-scope products under the CCC catalogue. GB standards and SRRC/CCC marks are applicable only within China.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线电型号认证由工信部/国家无线电管理局（SRRC）负责。连接公共电信网络的电信终端设备还须取得工信部网络接入许可（NAL）。CCC（中国强制认证）涵盖列入CCC目录的产品的电气安全和EMC。GB标准及SRRC/CCC标志仅适用于中国境内。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線電型號認證由工信部/國家無線電管理局（SRRC）負責。連接公共電信網路的電信終端設備還須取得工信部網路接入許可（NAL）。CCC（中國強制認證）涵蓋列入CCC目錄的產品的電氣安全和EMC。GB標準及SRRC/CCC標誌僅適用於中國境內。

standards_or_laws: MIIT SRRC Radio Type Approval (Regulations on Radio Administration, Article 58)
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — Measures for Telecom Equipment Access

gap.en: TRC type approval is a wholly independent process from SRRC, CCC, CE, or FCC. Neither SRRC approval nor CCC certification is recognised by TRC. Jordan has no regional mutual recognition arrangement that extends to Chinese, EU, or US approvals. A fresh TRC application with accredited-lab test reports, TRC conformity mark, and TRC approval number on label is required for every model imported or sold in Jordan. Spectrum parameters must comply with the Jordan National Frequency Plan; confirmation of permitted frequency bands (2.4 GHz, 5 GHz) and applicable power limits under TRC conditions is required.
gap.zh: TRC型号认证与SRRC、CCC、CE或FCC完全独立。TRC不承认SRRC批准或CCC认证。约旦不存在延伸至中国、欧盟或美国批准的区域性相互承认安排。每款在约旦进口或销售的产品均须重新进行TRC申请，提交经认可实验室出具的测试报告，并在标签上标注TRC合规标志和TRC审批号。频谱参数须符合约旦国家频率计划；须确认TRC条件下允许的频段（2.4 GHz、5 GHz）及适用功率限值。
gap.zht: TRC型號認證與SRRC、CCC、CE或FCC完全獨立。TRC不承認SRRC批准或CCC認證。約旦不存在延伸至中國、歐盟或美國批准的區域性相互承認安排。每款在約旦進口或銷售的產品均須重新進行TRC申請，提交經認可實驗室出具的測試報告，並在標籤上標注TRC合規標誌和TRC審批號。頻譜參數須符合約旦國家頻率計劃；須確認TRC條件下允許的頻段（2.4 GHz、5 GHz）及適用功率限值。

source.publisher: TRC — Telecommunications Regulatory Commission (Jordan / هيئة تنظيم قطاع الاتصالات)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] TRC type approval and the TRC conformity mark are mandatory for all wireless and telecom terminal equipment imported or sold in Jordan under Telecommunications Law No. 13 of 1995. SRRC, CCC, CE DoC, and FCC ID are not accepted substitutes. Jordan has no regional mutual recognition arrangement extending to Chinese approvals.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据1995年电信法第13号，TRC型号认证和TRC合规标志对所有在约旦进口或销售的无线及电信终端设备为强制要求。SRRC、CCC、CE DoC及FCC ID不可作为替代。约旦不存在延伸至中国批准的区域性相互承认安排。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據1995年電信法第13號，TRC型號認證和TRC合規標誌對所有在約旦進口或銷售的無線及電信終端設備為強制要求。SRRC、CCC、CE DoC及FCC ID不可作為替代。約旦不存在延伸至中國批准的區域性相互承認安排。
